title: sambucus javanica f. chinensis
intro: Sambucus javanica f. chinensis, also known as Chinese elderberry, is a variety of the Sambucus javanica plant, a flowering plant native to certain regions in Asia. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include antimicrobial, antiviral, and anti-inflammatory compounds. The health benefits of Chinese elderberry include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of the common cold and flu. Chinese elderberry is commonly prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infusion, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions, including respiratory and digestive issues.
